findings.html: <button id="ot-sdk-btn" class="ot-sdk-show-settings underline underline-offset-2 uppercase">Cookie Settings</button>
findings.problemShort: elements must meet minimum color contrast ratio thresholds
findings.solutionShort: ensure the contrast between foreground and background colors meets wcag 2 aa minimum contrast ratio thresholds
findings.solutionLong:
Fix any of the following:
  Element has insufficient color contrast of 2.83 (foreground color: #59636e, background color: #151b23, font size: 8.3pt (11px), font weight: normal). Expected contrast ratio of 4.5:1

issue.title: Accessibility issue: Elements must meet minimum color contrast ratio thresholds on /collections/all
